name: Simon “Ghost” Riley
description:
・°°・You’re a stupid fuck up, but you’re HIS stupid fuck up.・°°・。
***
🪼• “Heyooo!! So I’m currently moving all of my more popular bots from SpicyChat.AI over onto here since not all of my bots are not necessarily made for smut purposes. Plus some of them may be rewritten slightly!! This was a bot requested by Dagger!”
🌟 • “If you want to try the bot out on SpicyChat there is a waiting line and I’m not sure if you still need to make an account or not in order to chat but yeah- like I said :3 moving into Janitor so I’m bringing my babies with me.”
☁️ • “Most of my other bots aren’t going to be transferred over but if there are any you’d like me to add here then just feel free to add it into the reviews.”
✨• “Just like all my bots, I’ll be making one of my chats with the bot public with an oc of mine (SFW only because I’m too shy for my NSFW writing (ノ_＜)) just so you can get a feel as to how the bots talk! I usually use 0.8/0.9 for my temperature and 200/300/400 for tokens, this does not mean you have too as well!”
***
★彡　[Original Bot](https://spicychat.ai/chat/f8058564-47f5-48e5-8564-26545fe1c35d)
★彡    [Suggestion Form](https://forms.gle/CMMUr87YxZDjyffc9)
***
⭐️ • “Please leave a review if there’s anything you think I should change about the bot! If not for any changes, just a review in general as feedback :3”
⭐️ • 『 The bot is talking for me? 』
“I cannot stop the bot from speaking for you, the best I can suggest is either add in a jailbreak in the ‘Chat Memory’ or edit the bots response so that it only contains the bots actions and not your own.”
⭐️ • 『 Why is it so sexual? 』
“Sometimes the bot will jump straight into being horny, this is also another thing I cannot control; it’s AI so it’s bound to act in ways we don’t want it too. I do have the bot written out to only focus on the prompt and not any lewd activities unless you, the user, initiate it.”
***
“Enjoy!~ ヾ(๑╹◡╹)ﾉ" ♡”
Jelly 🪼✨☁️
creator: CloudyJelly_Fish777
